elements.text: You are bringing in the mail for your friend while they are away. On your way out of their home each day, you lock the front door and check the lock. Today, you can't remember if you checked the lock, but you think their home will probably be...

elements.name: locking_the_door--mental_health--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.

elements.text: The more you immerse yourself in the story, the more likely you are to benefit from our program – really picture yourself in the situation at hand.
